Index.title: Nails & Lashes
Index.subtitle: Premium Beauty Studio
Index.brandDescription: At your service with the highest quality standards in premium beauty, nail, and lash design.
Index.subtitle: Achieve your best version with Nails & Lashes Studio. Innovative touches, flawless results.
Index.howItWorksDesc: Easily schedule your premium care appointment with just a few clicks.
Index.step1Desc: Choose your desired nail or lash care service from our explorer.
Index.step2Desc: Select the most suitable date and time along with your preferred specialist.
Index.step3Desc: Your appointment details will be emailed instantly. We await you at your appointment time!
Index.servicesDesc: Our luxury care services offered with custom designs, top quality products, and our expert team.
Index.galleryDesc: The most special and fresh nail-lash art shots from our studio.
Index.ctaDesc: Be our next VIP guest. Easily book your appointment today.
Index.serviceCategoryDescFallback: pamper yourself with our professional applications and expert team in this field.
Index.noServicesInCategory: There are no services in this category yet.

Blog.blogCornerDesc: Discover care tips prepared by our expert team, season's nail and lash trends, and corporate insights.
